title: Abnormals Bare Bones
description: Incubation, Allurement, Pet Cemetery compat with Bare Bones
body:
![tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e64020c7a8520d415ab48c40b5716dbe619329c1.png)

### **Resourse Pack that adds Bare Bones compat with Mods created by [Team Abnormals](https://modrinth.com/organization/teamabnormals)**



**Currently compat:**
- [Incubation](https://modrinth.com/mod/incubation)
- [Pet Cemetery](https://modrinth.com/mod/pet-cemetery)
- [Allurement](https://modrinth.com/mod/allurement!)

My others projects:
- [Bare Bones: 3D Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/abnormals-bare-bones)
- [Bare Bones: Much Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/much-better-leaves-bare-bones)
  
##   Subscribe to my [YouTube channel!](https://www.youtube.com/@nazarbatrider)
